title: Xixi realtime development previews
objective: Upgrade the project preview center from isolated launch snapshots to truthful realtime development previews for the owner's active Gongtu, CanvasStorm, and Code Quest branches, with automatic frontend updates, branch-aware runtime labels, explicit data boundaries, and reproducible blocker evidence where legacy full-stack isolation cannot yet be completed.

tasks.title: Freeze the realtime preview contract and branch boundaries
tasks.acceptance: The authoritative Goal passes lint, every repository has a dedicated feature worktree, existing dirty working copies remain untouched, and live versus snapshot semantics are explicit.

tasks.title: Add realtime and multi-service runtime support to Xixi
tasks.acceptance: The dashboard identifies checked-out branches as live and detached branches as snapshots, allocates all declared service ports, records runtime/data facts, and covers these behaviors with automated tests.

tasks.title: Enable automatic updates for CanvasStorm and Code Quest
tasks.acceptance: A CanvasStorm frontend edit triggers an observable browser reload, while Code Quest uses Vite HMR with a dynamic API port and branch-specific database path; both projects retain their own verification evidence.

tasks.title: Enable Gongtu realtime frontend and audit full-stack isolation
tasks.acceptance: A Gongtu frontend edit triggers an observable browser reload on a dynamic port; backend and database isolation either pass a direct runtime test or have a reproducible blocker report with command, log, root cause, and executable follow-up task.

tasks.title: Run cross-project browser acceptance and publish PR evidence
tasks.acceptance: Desktop and mobile browser evidence shows the three projects, correct live/snapshot labels, and automatic update behavior; all relevant test suites pass, limitations are visible, and each changed repository has an intentional pushed PR.
